name: mixed_multibot_fix_and_skip_merge
description: Two bots in one round: Claude flags a real bug (fixed) and Copilot cites a helper that was never added (INVALID, skipped). The next round is clean from both and the loop merges. Exercises multi-bot + mixed disposition in one run.

rounds.body: the cache key here omits the tenant id, so two tenants collide on the same entry
call the new normalize_tenant() helper before building the key
rounds.classifier_response: INVALID|copilot|haiku|low|normalize_tenant() is not defined anywhere in this PR
